title: goety: more recpies
description: this project adds some qol recpies to goety and some of its addons
body:
a mod that adds quality-of-life recipes to Goety and its add-on Awaken!!

for now,this mod will require goety,goety awaken,revelation,goety delight,and cataclysm

If you want to suggest any recipe, go to the Goety server and look for the mod page there on player showcases

patcholui entries will be added later

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

also,for the
ancient teachings
recpie,it requires a hostile Redstone monstrosity to kill,not a servant

</details>
